chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Acq. Appeal No.367 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of case. 12.09.2025 None present for the appellant. Mr. Mohsin Mangi, APG Sindh. ------------------------------- It appears that for the last five dates from 19.07.2023 none is appearing on behalf of the appellant and today the position is same. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Asif
